---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem this would solve**
What user need or limitation does this address?

**Proposed solution**
What would the feature look like, ideally? (UI mockup, CLI flag, API sketch — anything is fine.)

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you've already tried.

**Additional context**
Links, screenshots, related issues.
